import one from '../assets/svg/projects/one.svg'
import two from '../assets/svg/projects/two.svg'

import eight from '../assets/svg/projects/eight.svg'


export const projectsData = [
    {
        id: 1,
        projectName: 'Messaging Application',
        projectDesc: 'Experience seamless real-time messaging with our Spring-powered chat app.',
        tags: ['RabbitMQ','Redis','WebSocket'],
        code: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/Messaging_App.git',
        demo: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/Messaging_App.git',
        image: one
    },
    {
        id: 2,
        projectName: 'Food Delivery API',
        projectDesc: 'Power your food delivery service with our robust API, enabling seamless ordering, tracking, and delivery management for restaurants and delivery partners',
        tags: ['Java','Spring Boot','MySQL'],
        code: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/Food_Devlivery_Project.git',
        demo: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/Food_Devlivery_Project.git',
        image: two
    },
    {
        id: 3,
        projectName: 'E-Commerce Microservice Architecture',
        projectDesc: 'This project outlines a microservices architecture for an e-commerce platform. The system utilizes Docker containers orchestrated by Kubernetes for deployment and management.',
        tags: ['Microservice Architecture','Kafka','Docker','Grafana'],
        code: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/E-Commerce-Microservice-Architecture.git',
        demo: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/E-Commerce-Microservice-Architecture.git',
        image: three
    },
    {
        id: 4,
        projectName: 'E-Commerce App',
        projectDesc: 'A simple User Friendly E-commerce application',
        tags: ['Spring Data JPA', 'Hibernate','MySQL'],
        code: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/E-Commerce.git',
        demo: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/E-Commerce.git',
        image: four
    },
    {
        id: 5,
        projectName: 'Spring Boot Employee Data Management System',
        projectDesc: 'A Spring Boot application for managing employee data with RESTful APIs, using lambda expressions for efficient data processing and external service integration.',
        tags: ['Java', 'Spring Boot', 'MySQL', 'Spring Data JPA'],
        code: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/Spring-Employee-Project.git',
        demo: 'https://github.com/BharathChavala1/Spring-Employee-Project.git',
        image: five
    },
    {
        id: 6,
        projectName: 'Order Management with Redis Caching and Pub/Sub',
        projectDesc: 'A Spring-based Order Management system using Redis for efficient caching and real-time Pub/Sub messaging, enhancing performance and enabling instant order updates across services.',
        tags: ['Spring Boot','Java','Redis','Spring MVC'],
        code: 'https://github.com/hhhrrrttt222111/developer-portfolio',
        demo: 'https://github.com/hhhrrrttt222111/developer-portfolio',
        image: six
    },
]
